title: Generic moments proof — arbitrary activity ID NEW01

overview.body: Minimal schema-valid page proving generic moments composition is independent of activity IDs.

activities.title: Generic understand-explain-check proof
activities.learner_task:
1. Read the core text.
2. Study the worked example.
3. Compare your thinking with the sample output.
4. Verify using the checklist.
5. Write a brief summary in your notes.
activities.expected_output: A concise summary demonstrating understanding of the core concept.
activities.activity_preamble: Proof fixture for IMP-013 generic composition.
activities.reasoning_orientation: Focus on semantic beat classification rather than activity IDs.
activities.self_explanation_prompt: How would you explain the difference between exposition and verification materials?

materials.title: Core exposition
materials.body: NEW01-M1: generic **text** material in Learn moment.

materials.title: Verification checklist
materials.body:
- Criterion NEW01-C1: core concept named
- Criterion NEW01-C2: example referenced
